title: douglasia nivalis var. dentata
intro: Douglasia nivalis var. dentata, also known as alpine douglasia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Douglasia nivalis var. dentata are said to include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
